text:
Aruto (アルト, Aruto), Aruto is the default name suggestion for the player when choosing the name of the character. a video game-only character protagonist of Hunter × Hunter: The Stolen Aura Stone, is a boy from a village that had the Aura Stone robbed by the Phantom Troupe. He chases the Spider with the only remaining Aura Stone's pieces/fragments. Hunter × Hunter: The Stolen Aura Stone (Game Manual/Booklet) 

Appearance

Aruto has tied back reddish-brown hair with layered bangs at the front. His eyes match the hair in color, and he wears a yellow green shirt with white geometric trims along the collar, sleeves, and hem. His shirt is worn over loose pants that split into white colored portions and light-blue ones. And he also wears white gloves.

Personality

Aruto is a serious, brave, and duty-driven boy whose main goal is to protect his village and recover the Aura Stone. His decision to pursue the Phantom Troupe shows courage considering how dangerous they are. He is cooperative as he joins forces with Gon, Killua, and others.

Plot

The Stolen Aura Stone

Aruto is a boy who lives in a village that relies on the Aura Stone as its lifeline. One day, the Phantom Troupe infiltrates the village and steals this stone. To save his village, Aruto embarks on a journey to track the stone down and retrieve it for his village. Hunter × Hunter: The Stolen Aura Stone 

Meeting The Chairman

Through his journey, Aruto finds himself inside the Hunter Association's airship, where he is informed by Netero of the thieves' identity. It was here that Netero and a few Hunter Exam examiners decided to help Aruto in his quest as he went on to face numerous enemies. 

The Retrieval of The Stone

Eventually, after a long struggle and through tenacious effort, Aruto recovers the stolen Aura Stone and returns it to the village. He is welcomed by his people and is celebrated as a Hero. 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Aruto is a very rare/unusual person whose Specialist Nen ability power is immeasurable.
